blockPalette.name: hero
blockPalette.description: Full-width hero section with background image, heading, and optional body text. Used at the top of every page.
blockPalette.contentModel: Standalone: Single row with image in one cell, heading + text in another. Decoration code finds h1/h2 and paragraphs via selectors.

blockPalette.name: columns
blockPalette.description: Side-by-side content layout. Used for image + text intro sections on treatment pages and homepage.
blockPalette.contentModel: Standalone: Each column is a cell in one row. Typically image | text with heading, paragraph, CTA.

blockPalette.name: cards
blockPalette.description: Grid of content items. Used for feature/benefit cards (icon + heading + text) on homepage and product cards on treatment pages.
blockPalette.contentModel: Collection: Each row is a card. Cells: image/icon | heading + description.

blockPalette.name: carousel
blockPalette.description: Rotating content panels. Used for before/after image comparison and product showcase carousels on treatment pages.
blockPalette.contentModel: Collection: Each row is a slide. Cells: image | text content.

blockPalette.name: accordion
blockPalette.description: Expandable/collapsible Q&A sections. Used on treatment pages for FAQ sections and on the main FAQ page.
blockPalette.contentModel: Collection: Each row has question (bold/heading) | answer text. Rows alternate question/answer.

blockPalette.name: tabs
blockPalette.description: Switchable tabbed content panels. Used for female/male treatment area views on homepage and treatment pages.
blockPalette.contentModel: Auto-blocked: Section with tab labels as headings, content under each heading becomes tab panel. Section metadata identifies as tabs.

sections.description: Hero section with key visual and brand tagline
Brand intro with image alongside heading, description, and value propositions
Before/after comparison carousel showing treatment results
Treatment areas with female/male tabs, each showing treatment options with images and links
Clinic finder call-to-action with location search
References/footnotes section
Hero section with treatment-specific image and heading
Treatment introduction with image alongside descriptive text
Three benefit/feature highlight cards with icons
Before/after comparison carousel
Product cards carousel showcasing relevant Juvéderm products
FAQ accordion with image sidebar
Treatment areas with female/male tabs
Clinic finder CTA
References/footnotes
Hero with FAQ page image and heading
Topic navigation links
About Juvéderm section with heading, body text, image, and key takeaways
Safety section with side effects list and key takeaways
What to expect section with consultation info, process description, and pain info
Cost and results section with duration details and permanence info
Facial areas section with treatment zone descriptions
References/footnotes
Heading and location search prompt
City shortcut links and location input with image
References/footnotes
Simple heading and body text content — default content only, no blocks needed

siteConventions.imageDelivery: Adobe Dynamic Media — images served from dm-aid CDN URLs
siteConventions.footnotes: All pages end with numbered references/footnotes. These should be default content in a final section.
siteConventions.ctaPattern: Primary CTA is 'Vind je kliniek' (Find your clinic) — appears on every page
siteConventions.legalDisclaimer: Footer contains mandatory AbbVie/Allergan Aesthetics legal disclaimer text and warning banner

sharedComponents.treatmentTabs: Female/male treatment area tabs appear on homepage and all treatment pages — identical content, candidate for fragment block
sharedComponents.clinicFinder: Embedded clinic finder with location search appears on homepage and all treatment pages — simplified to CTA link in EDS
sharedComponents.beforeAfter: Before/after image comparison appears on homepage and all treatment pages
